description: Flat line-art IKEA instruction manual style
_comment: Generates minimalist flat line-art illustrations in the iconic style of IKEA assembly instructions — simple shapes, clean outlines, no faces or colours, and step-based visual storytelling.
_comment_model: Base: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0. LoRA: ostris/ikea-instructions-lora-sdxl, trained on IKEA-style flat-pack instruction illustrations. ~6 GB SDXL + LoRA; sequential_cpu_offload recommended on ≤16 GB.
_comment_prompt: No trigger word needed. Use simple nouns or short scene descriptions. Examples: 'hamburger', 'a dog', 'back to the future', 'a bicycle being assembled', 'a person building a bookshelf'.
_comment_negative: Usually not needed. 'blurry, low quality' can help if output is soft.
_comment_steps: 30 steps at CFG 7.5 is the recommended starting point per model card.
_comment_cfg: CFG 5–8. Model card examples use 7.5. Lower values give softer lines.
_comment_lora_scale: 1.0 gives the strongest IKEA style effect per model card.
